---
title: "Dr. Dinh Nguyen joined VinUni"
description: "Starting a new journey with VinUni as an Assistant Professor"
author: "Dinh Nguyen"
date: "2022-09-05"
image: vinuni2022.jpg
draft: false
categories:
  - update
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
comments:
  utterances: 
    repo: https://github.com/icclabo/icc
    label: joinvinuni2022
---

I have joined College of Engineering and Computer Science, VinUniversity, Hanoi, Vietnam, after spending 10 years working and studying oversea. I am excited to be back and contribute to my home country.

VinUniversity (VinUni) is a private, not-for-profit university in Vietnam established by Vingroup, the country’s largest private conglomerate. Founded with an investment of VND 6,500 billion, it is designed to meet international standards and is often recognized as one of the most prestigious and modern academic institutions in Vietnam

<!--
> Affective and Interpersonal Communication: Advancing an Interdisciplinary
Program of Research

{{< pdf Girard_TT_Slides.pdf width=600 height=400 image_width=600 image_border=1 image=firstslide.png >}}
-->
